markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, review the calibration blog, and demo the new Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** Vizcom will balance high-volume SEO topics with deep-dive product content to build authority and capture less-known use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** A new Looker dashboard combines GA4 and GSC data to track content performance by topic cluster, enabling strategic refinement.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Decision:** Competitor comparison articles will be deferred. This avoids internal friction with the CEO, who is new to this content format.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [**Approval Process:** Emily will review the Content OS with CEO Jordan to finalize industry terms and streamline future approvals by batching topics.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [**Goal:** Balance high-volume SEO topics with deep-dive product content to build authority and capture less-known use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The blog is new, so a balanced content mix is needed to avoid focusing too heavily on a single type (e.g., theory, competitive).](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [**SEO vs. Conversion:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Use high-volume topics (e.g., "product design") to build visibility and rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Even a small conversion percentage from this large audience is a win.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [**Tactic:** Link to specific Vizcom resources and CTAs within these articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [**AI Search Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [Prioritize topics where existing content is poor or incomplete.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This allows Vizcom to stand out and be cited by LLMs quickly.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)

### Looker Dashboard Demo

  - [Aida demoed the new Looker dashboard, which combines GA4 and GSC data for performance tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**Key Reports:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
      - [**Sessions:** Tracks overall vs. engaged sessions (duration \>10s, scroll, or click).](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
          - [**Goal:** Increase the engaged session ratio by publishing more educational content.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
      - [**Landing Page Engagement:** Shows engagement rate (inverse of bounce rate).](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
          - [**Significance:** Higher engagement rates improve SEO ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Non-Branded Traffic:** GSC data on non-branded queries.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Conversions:** Lists all GA4 conversion events.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
          - [**Action:** Vizcom to clarify what each event tracks for accurate measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Cohort Page:** Tracks GrowthX content performance by topic cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Enables strategic refinement by showing which clusters drive traffic and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [**Queries Report:** Shows keywords driving traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
          - [**Use Case:** Discover new content opportunities from low-volume keywords not found in SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**LLM Report:** Shows traffic from LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
          - [**Finding:** ChatGPT is the top referrer, a common pattern for GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
          - [**Significance:** Publishing accurate content prevents LLMs from misrepresenting Vizcom's features.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)

### Content Approval & Production

  - [**Calibration Blog:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [Emily provided initial feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Emily will review industry terms with CEO Jordan to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Content OS Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Emily will review the "industry terms" section with Jordan on Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Jordan is opinionated on industry style; this ensures alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Leverage terms from the "visual communications" curriculum, the source of Vizcom's name.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**Competitor Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [**Decision:** Defer competitor comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The CEO is new to this content format; a gradual introduction is preferred to avoid internal friction.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [**Inline Images:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [**Plan:** GrowthX will create infographic-style inline images for all blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides a visual element for all articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
      - [**Vizcom's Role:** Add product screenshots to high-performing articles on an as-needed basis.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Emily:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Finalize feedback on the calibration blog today.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Review the Content OS "industry terms" section with CEO Jordan on Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
      - [Confirm invoice status with the finance lead and update the Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [Start drafting three new blogs tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [Share the brand guideline summary with Vizcom via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [Adapt the image pipeline to create infographic-style inline images for all blogs.](https://fathom.video/share/8psry3_YpcbBzcxd2LfyyYABpxA4NvU9?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
